title: Calm Columns
description:
Tired of bubble columns cluttering your view?
This pack tones down their visual intensity, making them far less intrusive while preserving their function and style. Perfect for underwater bases, mob farms, or any build where bubble spam gets in the way.
body:
This is a pack I created after working with a lot of bubble columns, the bubbles kept taking up screen real estate and prevented me from doing tasks efficiently. 
This pack just changes bubble particles to be less invasive and easy to see through

I hope you get the functionality needed.

Even though the pack says incompatible version it should still work.
